issue.weather: Cloudy w/ chance of patch notes

ticker.text: Vampire Crawlers out now — 80 Metacritic, day one Game Pass
AoM Retold: Obsidian Mirror drops today — Aztecs finally arrive
WoW Midnight Patch 12.0.5 live — Void Assaults, Decor Duels, Voidforge
Saros 9 days out — Housemarque's Returnal follow-up locks April 30
Starfield Switch 2 rating filed in Taiwan — Xbox Showcase June 7 eyed

lead.title: Vampire Crawlers Is Here — Poncle Just Did It Again
lead.dek: The one-person studio behind Vampire Survivors took their beloved universe and turned it into a first-person deckbuilding dungeon crawler. It launched today to an 80 on Metacritic and it's day one on Game Pass. Here's what critics are saying.
lead.author: Romello Morris

poll.question: What's your most anticipated game still to come this month?

calendar.title: Kiln
calendar.sub: Full Launch · Day One Game Pass

calendar.title: Saros
calendar.sub: PS5 Exclusive · Deluxe Early Access Apr 28

spotlight.title: Vampire Crawlers: Poncle's Wildest Swing Yet
spotlight.blurb: A one-person studio turned their bullet-heaven hit into a first-person deckbuilding blobber. Vampire Crawlers launched today at $9.99 with day-one Game Pass — and critics are calling it one of the year's best indie releases.

comments.name: Marcus T.
comments.body: Vampire Crawlers demo was already 30 hours of content. At $9.99 day one Game Pass this is the easiest recommendation of the year. Poncle cannot miss.

comments.name: Jade W.
comments.body: Saros in 9 days. I finished Returnal twice and I still don't feel ready. Housemarque is something else.

comments.name: Devon K.
comments.body: Diablo 4 Lord of Hatred confirmed for Switch 2 is the announcement I didn't know I needed. The first major Diablo on Nintendo since 2018. Wild.

comments.name: Priya S.
comments.body: Starfield Switch 2 rating is real. Taiwan BSRR has been accurate on every single leak this year. June 7 Xbox Showcase is the announcement window, calling it now.
